items.title: Cynthia Cooper and Teresa Weatherspoon drafted teams for the WNBA All-Star game, July 25 in Chicago.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Cynthia Cooper and Teresa Weatherspoon drafted teams for the WNBA All-Star game, July 25 in Chicago.

Cooper was assigned Paige Bueckers, Weathersppon assigned Caitlin Clark. Kelsey Mitchell taken by Cooper 4th, Boston by Weatherspoon 5th.

So Clark/Boston are teammates.

items.title: A year ago, I attended camp day when the #Sparks hosted the #Lynx. This was when ICE activity really increased in SoCal. I asked both Phee and Coach Reeve about it.
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
A year ago, I attended camp day when the #Sparks hosted the #Lynx. This was when ICE activity really increased in SoCal. I asked both Phee and Coach Reeve about it.

Sucks that so many places are STILL dealing with this. Innocent lives like Lorenzo Salgado Araujo still being taken...

items.title: Final: Lynx 96, Sparks 87. Los Angeles led by 9 in the third quarter but Minnesota answered with a flurry. Turnovers (20) were the biggest impediment to success. Rae Burrell tied her career-high with 24 points. Sparks are 10-13. They’re at Chicago on Friday.
items.author: Justin Russo
